rulings.Case Title: BRETT PENFIL VS. SUSAN BADGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Reqeust For Productions Of Documents, Set Two And Supplement Request For Documents; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Susan Badger And Her Attorney, Todd Angstadt, In The Amount Of $1,304.50
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday March 29, 2019 Line 1. PLAINTIFF BRETT PENFIL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Reqeust For Productions Of Documents, Set Two And Supplement Request For Documents; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Susan Badger And Her Attorney, Todd Angstadt, In The Amount Of $1,304.50 is DENIED. Motion is moot in part, as unredacted documents have been provided. Motion is denied as to Defendant's notes prepared for attorney-consultation. Defendant to provide a privilege log by April 2, 2019. Request for sanctions is denied. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS ROLIZ-MAGUIGAD VS. K5 FAMILY LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday March 29, 2019 Line 2. Defendant'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees is GRANTED in the amount of $14,460 (36 hours at $400/hour; $60 filing fee). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday March 29, 2019 Line 3. DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states facts to support both causes of action. =(501/CFH)
